name: MVP Specification Writer
description: Synthesises idea validation and market scan into a tight MVP specification with a clear scope boundary.

checks.prompt: Write the MVP specification: (1) 5 must-have features (numbered), (2) 5 explicitly out-of-scope items, (3) success metrics (3 measurable KPIs), (4) definition of 'done' for the MVP. Be ruthlessly scoped. Context: {retryContext}
